content: READY TO REDEFINE YOUR MANUFACTURING STRATEGY?With FANUC you're in safe hands. With over 40 million automation products installed worldwide, 25 locations, and a Service First support network that guarantees lifetime support on all FANUC products 24 7 worldwide  you can see why FANUC is trusted by more companies than anyone else.Explore CNC Explore Robots Explore Robodrill

metadata.description: World's leading supplier of Robotics, CNCs and ROBOMACHINE. FANUC provides reliable, easy-to-use and cost-effective automation solutions for increased productivity.
